name: notification-arrive
title: Notification Arrive
description: Animation primitive — iOS-style drop-from-top with spring settle (mild overshoot). Wraps a notification banner (af-ios-notification, liquid-glass-frame, etc.) to give it the canonical iOS 'ding!' arrival motion: drops down + scales slightly + settles. Distinct from SwipeIn because of the spring overshoot — that's what makes it FEEL like a real notification. Used for kundenstimmen pages showing real notifications from leads / customers arriving in real time. Modular: HOC-style, composes with any child. Honors `prefers-reduced-motion`.
